name: Item Get
description: a cheerful little fanfare for receiving a new item into the inventory
usage: Play when a tool or item enters the inventory.

ai.prompt: Receiving an important item: a warm, triumphant short orchestral-tinged flourish with a soft harp/bell sparkle, rewarding and premium. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
